initial.hint: left red: d | right yellow: j | up green: w/o | down red: c/,
controls: Left side: a blue, s green, d red, f yellow
Right side: ö blue, l green, k red, j yellow
Up: q/p blue, w/o green, e/i red, r/u yellow
Down: y/- blue, x/. green, c/, red, v/m yellow
Move into the neighboring gem by pressing its side and color key.

afterUp.hint: left blue: a | right yellow: j | up red: e/i | down red: c/,
controls: Left side: a blue, s green, d red, f yellow
Right side: ö blue, l green, k red, j yellow
Up: q/p blue, w/o green, e/i red, r/u yellow
Down: y/- blue, x/. green, c/, red, v/m yellow
Moved up. Collapsed 1 gems! +1 points.
